title: The effect of --StepSize option on all POI's

posts.name: Elham Khazaie
posts.text:
Dear combine experts,
I would like to make an impact plot using combine and I am wondering:
Does the " --stepSize" option in Multidim fit affect all POI’s?
How can we make sure that all POI’s have a given StepSize?
Any feedback or information would be greatly appreciated.
Cheers,
Elham
posts.cooked_html:
Dear combine experts,
I would like to make an impact plot using combine and I am wondering:
Does the " --stepSize" option in Multidim fit affect all POI’s?
How can we make sure that all POI’s have a given StepSize?
Any feedback or information would be greatly appreciated.
Cheers,
Elham

posts.name: Adinda de Wit
posts.text:
Dear Elham,
Yes, it does. If you require a specific --stepSize for a given parameter, you can run that one separately by running the --doFits step with the --named option: https://github.com/cms-analysis/CombineHarvester/blob/master/CombineTools/python/combine/Impacts.py#L36  (e.g --named “Parameter1”)
Hope that helps,
Adinda

Adinda
